description: Fantasy races and mythical beings that can serve as characters.
characters: Elf
A graceful, long-lived being attuned to nature and starlight.
Dwarf
A stout, sturdy folk who delve deep and craft masterworks in stone and metal.
Goblin
A small, cunning creature with sharp wits and sharper teeth.
Troll
A hulking brute with thick skin and a temper to match.
Ogre
A massive, dim-witted giant with tremendous strength.
Gnome
A tiny, clever tinkerer with an outsized imagination.
Halfling
A small, cheerful folk with nimble fingers and warm hearts.
Orc
A fierce, tusked warrior from the wild lands.
Kobold
A small, scrappy creature that thrives in tunnels and traps.
Fairy
A tiny, winged being shimmering with mischievous magic.
Sprite
A playful forest spirit no bigger than a butterfly.
Centaur
A noble being with the upper body of a human and the legs of a horse.
Minotaur
A bull-headed warrior who prowls twisting corridors.
Sphinx
A riddling guardian with the body of a lion and the face of wisdom.
Selkie
A seal-skinned shapeshifter who walks between sea and shore.
Kitsune
A fox spirit who shifts form and weaves illusions.
Naga
A serpentine being of ancient power and cold cunning.
Nymph
A nature spirit of breathtaking beauty tied to a wild place.
Dryad
A tree spirit whose life is bound to a single ancient trunk.
Satyr
A goat-legged reveler who lives for music and mischief.
Djinn
A being of smokeless fire who grants wishes with a twist.
Imp
A tiny, mischievous demon who delights in minor chaos.
Pixie
A tiny, glowing trickster who leads travelers astray.
Mermaid
A sea-dweller with a shimmering tail who sings to passing ships.
Valkyrie
A winged warrior maiden who chooses the worthy fallen.
Leprechaun
A tiny, gold-hoarding trickster from the emerald hills.
Oni
A horned ogre-demon from eastern legend.
Tengu
A bird-like trickster and master of martial arts.
Changeling
A shapeshifter who can become anyone they've seen.
Banshee
A wailing spirit whose cry foretells death.
Treant
A walking tree of immense age and slow wisdom.
Giant
A towering being whose footsteps shake the ground.
Tiefling
A mortal touched by infernal heritage, bearing horns and tail.
Aasimar
A mortal blessed with celestial light shining within.
Goliath
A mountain-born giant kin who thrives in harsh heights.
Kenku
A raven-folk who speaks only in mimicked sounds.
Tabaxi
A cat-folk driven by curiosity and wanderlust.
Tortle
A turtle-folk of patient wisdom and sturdy shell.
Dragonborn
A proud, dragon-blooded warrior who breathes elemental fury.
Merfolk
An ocean-dwelling people who swim between reef and shore.
